calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Continued To Nov-25-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Plaintiff Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Class And Representative Allegations Pursuant To California Rules Of Court Rule 3.770(A)-(C)
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF RUTH RIVERA-BARNETT , INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED Notice Of Plaintiff Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Class And Representative Allegations Pursuant To California Rules Of Court Rule 3.770(A)-(C)

The unopposed motion to dismiss this case with prejudice as to named plaintiff Ruth Rivera-Barnett and without prejudice as to the putative class is granted. The court finds that the dismissal is fair to absent class members.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CVA)
